title: Sales Executive | Acoustic & Soundproofing Solutions
description:
• Up to S$4,000 Basic + S$50 Mobile Allowance + Quarterly Commission + Variable Bonus.

  • 11 Woodlands Close

  • Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM.

    • Saturday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM (First 3 months in-office).

    • After 3 months: Alternate Saturdays Work-From-Home (2 Saturdays in-office, 2 Saturdays WFH).

  • Minimum 2 years of sales experience, specifically with Acoustic products.

Join a dynamic team specializing in high-performance acoustic and soundproofing products. As a Sales Executive, you will manage a balanced portfolio (50% Hunter / 50% Farmer), serving both B2B and B2C markets. From commercial offices to residential setups, you will be the expert guiding clients toward the best sound management solutions, ensuring both aesthetic and functional standards are met through site visits and strategic proposals.

Responsibilities:

  • Business Development (50% Hunter): Proactively identify and secure meetings with key decision-makers through outbound calling, email marketing, and networking.

  • Account Management (50% Farmer): Maintain and grow relationships with existing clients and form new strategic partnerships.

  • Site Assessment: Conduct site visits to evaluate project progress, take measurements, and ensure acoustic installations comply with industry standards.

  • Strategic Planning: Assist the Sales Lead in analyzing market performance to create winning business proposals and sales pitches.

  • End-to-End Sales: Manage the full sales cycle from cold-calling and prospecting to negotiation and closing.

  • Market Presence: Identify and attend relevant networking events to build a strong pipeline of leads.

  • Operational Support: Assist in daily administrative tasks and ensure efficient time management for site visit scheduling.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Business Studies or a related field.

  • Must have proven experience with Acoustic products (e.g., soundproofing, acoustic panels, insulation).

  • Proven experience in outdoor sales with strong negotiation skills.

  • Energetic, confident, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment.

Others information:

  • Attractive Commission: Boost your earnings with a Quarterly Commission structure on top of a competitive basic salary.

  • Flexible Saturday Schedule: Enjoy the flexibility of alternate Work-From-Home Saturdays after your initial training period.

  • Career Growth: Opportunities to influence sales strategy and take ownership of high-value acoustic projects.

Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Details of acoustic products you have handled.

  • Availability to commence work.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
